recent_projects.name: folio-data-import
recent_projects.summary: A python module to perform bulk import of data into a FOLIO environment. Currently supports MARC and user data import.

recent_projects.name: pyaiagent
recent_projects.summary: PyAiAgent is a modern, fast (high-performance), async framework for building AI agents with pythonic code.

recent_projects.name: openagents
recent_projects.summary: A flexible framework for building multi-agent systems with customizable protocols
recent_projects.author: OpenAgents Team

recent_projects.name: terrence
recent_projects.summary: Terrence is a Python package that makes it easy to scan and analyze GitHub repositories. It simplifies the GitHub API and processes the repo contents into a simple flat dictionary that can be accessed by file path.
recent_projects.author: GarfieldFluffJr

recent_projects.name: pulumi-artifactory
recent_projects.summary: A Pulumi package for creating and managing artifactory cloud resources.

API offers Visio file creation, manipulation, conversion and rendering. Developers can format pages to the most granular level, create and manipulate shape, render pages, shapes to PDF and images, and much more - all without any dependency on Microsoft Office or Visio application.
